Hampton VA

Asphalt Paving
Hampton VA

Serving Hampton VA's coastal neighborhoods — 90 miles from Chester for quality you can count on

Get a Free Estimate 📞 (804) 446-1296
🏆 40+ Years Experience ✅ Licensed & Insured ⭐ 4.8-Star Rated 📋 Free Estimates

Hampton VA's Expert Asphalt Paving Contractor

Hampton is one of Virginia's oldest cities and one of its most distinctive — a coastal Hampton Roads community defined by its military heritage at Langley Air Force Base and NASA Langley Research Center, its waterfront neighborhoods stretching from Phoebus to Buckroe Beach, and its established civilian communities along Mercury Boulevard. The city's unique coastal environment creates paving challenges that inland contractors often underestimate. Salt air accelerates oxidation in asphalt surfaces, marine humidity promotes moisture intrusion, and sandy coastal soils behave very differently from the Piedmont clay found in the Richmond area. J. Worden & Sons has the expertise to handle Hampton's specific paving environment correctly.

Our approach to coastal paving in Hampton starts with understanding the site's specific exposure. Properties along the Hampton waterfront and near Buckroe Beach face the most aggressive environment — we address this with quality sealcoating materials, thorough edge sealing, and careful drainage engineering to prevent salt-laden groundwater from undermining the base. Properties in more sheltered inland Hampton neighborhoods — Fox Hill, Wythe, Aberdeen, the Langley AFB community — follow standard best-practice installation but still benefit from more frequent sealcoating intervals given the regional humidity. Sandy coastal plain soils throughout Hampton require proper compaction technique and adequate aggregate base depth to deliver a stable, long-lasting surface. We factor all of this into every Hampton project estimate.

Services in Hampton VA

  • Asphalt driveway paving & full replacement
  • Commercial parking lot paving
  • Coastal-appropriate sealcoating
  • Pothole patching & crack sealing
  • Grading, excavation & base preparation
  • Parking lot line striping & ADA compliance
  • Drainage engineering for waterfront properties
  • Concrete, cobblestone & stone masonry

What Hampton VA Customers Say

4.8-star average across 50+ verified reviews. Here's what customers in the Hampton VA area say about J. Worden & Sons.

★★★★★
"Had our driveway done near Langley AFB. Used J. Worden after a recommendation from another military family in the area. Worth every mile of the drive — best paving job we've ever had. Professional from the first call to the final cleanup."
Lt. Col. James W., Hampton VA
★★★★★
"Our coastal driveway at Buckroe Beach was deteriorating fast from the salt air exposure. J. Worden used the right materials and techniques for a coastal environment. Two years later, it still looks great and shows no signs of the cracking we had before."
Donna H., Buckroe Beach Hampton

4.8 ★ Average · 50+ Verified Reviews · Houzz

Asphalt Paving Hampton VA — FAQs

How much does asphalt paving cost in Hampton VA?

Asphalt paving in Hampton VA runs $3–$7 per square foot for residential driveways. A standard two-car driveway (600–800 sq ft) typically costs $2,500–$6,000. Commercial lots are quoted individually by project scope. We travel from Chester VA — approximately 90 miles via I-64. All estimates are free, written, and in-person. Contact us at (804) 446-1296 to discuss your Hampton VA project.

How does Hampton's coastal climate affect asphalt paving and longevity?

Hampton's coastal location introduces salt air and marine humidity that accelerate asphalt deterioration on surfaces that aren't properly maintained. Properties near Buckroe Beach and the waterfront are particularly exposed. We address this with quality emulsion sealcoating, thorough edge sealing, and drainage engineering to prevent salt-laden moisture from penetrating the sub-base. With the right approach and maintenance schedule, Hampton driveways can achieve the same 20–30 year lifespan as inland surfaces.

Do you travel to Hampton VA from your Chester base?

Yes — we travel to Hampton VA for residential and commercial paving projects. At approximately 90 miles from our Chester VA base via I-64, Hampton is within our extended service range. We prioritize larger or more complex projects in the Hampton Roads area. Military family driveways, commercial lots, and multi-phase projects in Hampton are a good fit. Contact us to discuss your project and we'll confirm our availability.

What special paving considerations apply near Hampton's waterfront and Buckroe Beach?

Waterfront properties near Buckroe Beach face Virginia's most aggressive paving environment. Sandy coastal soils with high water tables require careful compaction and drainage engineering. Salt air demands more frequent sealcoating — every 2–3 years rather than the 3–4 year interval for inland properties. Perimeter drainage is critical to prevent groundwater from undermining the base. We factor all of these considerations into our coastal paving approach and discuss them fully during the estimate visit.

Can you handle military housing and commercial paving near Langley AFB?

Yes — we serve military families and commercial property owners in the Langley AFB community and surrounding Hampton neighborhoods. Military families value our punctuality, clear communication, and commitment to quality workmanship. Commercial paving near the base and Mercury Blvd corridor includes full lot installation, ADA-compliant design and striping, and drainage engineering. Contact us to discuss your project specifics.
